source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, the internal resistance of the ammeter \( R_g = 600 \, \Omega \), the full-scale deflection current \( I_g = 400 \, \mu A \), resistor \( R_1 = 400 \, \Omega \), and resistor \( R_2 = 9400 \, \Omega \). When the switch S is closed, the device is converted into a ( ) meter with a range of ( ).
